feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Simulate creation of RFQ using RAP BO
entry.content:
Hi,

Previously, we are using BAPI_QUOTATION_CREATEFROMDATA2 to simulate the creation of the quotation. When using the RAP BO(https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_REQUESTFORQUOTATIONTP), do we have any equivalent functionality? Like if there are during the MODIFY ENTITIES statement, we can call the ROLLBACK ENTITIES? Or is there an equivalent operation/API to do this?

entry.title: How to transport the scope items activated in D system to T system.
entry.content:
After add scope items in CBC systems, the related scope items are not activated in T system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Expose a custom table(ZTABLE) available in S4 HANA using CDS views to SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am trying to expose a custom CDS view that needs to be consumed in the SAC.

I have a custom table and SAP allows only CDS view to be called in the Custom CDS (data source name) that we are exposing using few annotations to CDS.

Annotations used to expose CDS : 

//@Analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE -> Unable to use this annotation.

@analytics.dataExtraction.enabled: true

@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION / #BASIC -> What to use ?

@analytics.query: true

@OData.publish: true

Example: 

Table Name : ZTABLE

Fields : VBELN, POSNR, VBTYP, MATNR, WERKS, LGORT.

Is there any other solution to expose the custom table directly to SAP Analytics Cloud ? Please let me know how i can achieve a solution to this case.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Error: Action not possible for picking relevant items /SCWM/DELIVERY 183
entry.content: When creating direct outbound delivery with nested HUs, the system ends up with error /SCWM/DELIVERY 183. This error is captured in /SCWM/CL_IM_PRDO_ACTION_HU~CREATE_ITEM_FOR_HU in line 382 loop, where item relevance is validated for WM move. Since its relevant, the error message was displayed. I am not sure why the status relevant is an error here. Please advise if anyone have any experience or solution for creating direct outbound delivery with nested HU.

entry.title: SAP ABAP
entry.content: SQL error 600 occurred when accessing program sapm

entry.title: Error occurs on hdbviews execution after adding meins field to FBL3H
entry.content:
Hi experts, I am adding meins to fbl3h but when I try to execute HDBviews for adding new field to FBL3H it occurs error. Also when I delete the meins field error become disapeared.

Thanks for reply.

entry.title: Does Embedded Steampunk on-premise require BTP service key
entry.content: We are investigating Embedded Steampunk on-premise in S/4Hana 2022 SP2. From Eclipse, there is an option for ABAP Cloud Project, is this embedded steampunk? When selected it prompts for a Service key. Is BTP required to use the Embedded Steampunk functionality on-premise?

entry.title: Error in RFC Connection
entry.content:
Hi, while i am creating RFC Connection i have got error like this, can anyone tell how to resolve this and why i am getting this error.

Error Details Error when opening an RFC connection (CPIC-CALL: 'ThSAPOCMINIT', communication r

Error Details ERROR: partner 'telemedia-ap-static-157.13.175.122.airtelbroadband.in:sapgw81

Error Details LOCATION: SAP-Gateway on host SAPECC-EPPI.svm.com / sapgw00

Error Details DETAIL: NiPConnect2: 122.175.13.157:3300

Error Details CALL: connect

Error Details COMPONENT: NI (network interface)

Error Details COUNTER: 23975

Error Details ERROR NUMBER: 10060

Error Details ERROR TEXT: WSAETIMEDOUT: Connection timed out

Error Details MODULE: D:/depot/bas/753_REL/src/base/ni/nixxi.cpp

Error Details LINE: 3450

Error Details RETURN CODE: -10

Error Details SUBRC: 0

Error Details RELEASE: 753

Error Details TIME: Wed Feb 21 10:27:13 2024

Error Details VERSION: 40

entry.title: Model product Specification Odata service in ABAP Cloud environment
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I have a requirement to read the model product specification details and when tried to create a CDS using the entities I_MODELPRODUCTSPECIFICATIONTP , I_ModProdSpecItemTP was getting the below error . Kindly share an alternate approach to achieve the same . I cannot use the standard tables mmpur_mps_header ,mmpur_mps_item in the CDS as the Lang version is 'ABAP For Cloud Dev' .

The use of element MODELPRODUCTSPECIFICATIONUUID of CDS ENTITY I_MODELPRODUCTSPECIFICATIONTP is not permitted.
The use of CDS ENTITY I_MODELPRODUCTSPECIFICATIONTP is not permitted.

Regards,

Niranjan

entry.title: How to create CR using SOAP BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Using Service ( BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In ) can we save change request in Draft Mode? if yes what was the parameter need to be passed in the input level ?

And need to capture the the warning ,error or Success messages as well . can any one help me on the development.

SAP Master Data Governance 

SAP BTP, ABAP environment 

 

@markus_greutter 

@SAPABAP 

@MDGS

entry.title: create inline a filter table with new abap syntax
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I have a table productions containing, among others, article ids. Now I want to loop over all entries for which no Article ID exists in the articleIs table. Can I do this inline with the new abap syntax. 

Something like this

 

LOOP AT filter #( productions IN articles where ArticleId not in articles-ArticleId ) INTO DATA(production).

 

Does anyone know if this is possible.

Thanks and regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Using ALV, Can I display multiple sales document that is related to a material?
entry.content:
Hi, currently I was able to display the 1 sales document to related to my material. But there were multiple sales document related to my material.

This is my current logic:

it_output - this contains the material number. Sales document will be mapped on the loop.

MaterialSales Document
1800 
7107 

it_salesdoc - this contains the sales document which will be used for mapping.

MaterialSales Document
1800123456
1800789010
1800111213
7107571234
7107888123
71077741312

LOOP AT it_output INTO ls_output

DATA(lv_so) = VALUE #( it_salesdoc [ matnr = ls_output-matnr ]-vbeln ).

ls_output-vbeln = lv_so.

MODIFY it_output FROM ls_output TRANSPORTING vbeln WHERE matnr = ls_output-matnr.

ENDLOOP.

Current display is this:

MaterialSales Document
1800123456
7107571234

Can I display it something like this? 

MaterialSales Document
1800123456
1800789010
1800111213
7107571234
7107888123
71077741312

entry.title: Change Material in Sales Order Line Item Using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello All , I want  to change sales order line item material through BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE , I have written all those required ABAP codes , but still am getting an error : "Field 'MATNR' cannot be changed, VBAPKOM 000010 ready for input"

Kindly guide me the steps to achieve this .

Screenshot :

#SAPABAP #ABAP #BAPI

entry.title: Custom Business Object SAP HANA
entry.content: How will SLT enabling works in CBO ? Is it same as normal DB Table because every CBO will have underlying DB Table ?

entry.title: VBEP S/4 HANA VS R/3
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please indicate me the new features related to the VBEP in S/4 HANA?

In particular, compared to R/3, I've found the fields: DLVQTY_BU, DLVQTY_SU, OCDQTY_BU, OCDQTY_SU, ORDQTY_BU, ORDQTY_SU. What's the differences?

Can I use the ODN_AMOUNT to select the open value referred to the specific schedule line (not to the item)?

If i select the records related to one of the "open quantity" fields with value not equal to zero, the result is equal to VBBE?

Thanks and regards.

entry.title: Promises in ABAP - like in Javascript
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Do we have Promises in ABAP  ? 

Thanks-

entry.title: Is it possible to run BPC script logic code by ABAP code?
entry.content:
Hi, all.

Is it possible to run a BPC script logic code by ABAP code, for example to have the BPC script logic in a string variable in an ABAP program and call a function module or a method to run it?

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Parallel Cursor vs LOOP AT WHERE, which is faster?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I want my code to look short and also perform fast and I need some expert to confirm which is the right way from below two.
PARALLEL CURSOR CODE:
Sadly we cant shorten this with new syntaxes. (maybe line_index can help?)

LOOP AT WHERE CODE:
This is shorter to code, but I am sure its not faster.

Maybe parallel cursor can be written with line_index since it is similar to READ TABLE TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS. Is it advisable?

 


Thank You!

entry.title: Error msg during Factory Action - Copy execute in RAP application (BTP)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

BTP - ABAP Environment

I am currently testing the Factory Action - Copy of RAP.

When I select a record in the ListReport screen and click the CopyInstance button, it automatically navigates to the ObjectPage, which is in Draft status.

After clicking Save and returning to the ListReport, if I select the same record again and click the CopyInstance button, the error shown in the attached image appears.

 

However, the Copy action still executes successfully.

I would like to confirm the cause of this issue.

 

Please find the reference code snippet below.

factory action copyInstance[1];
 METHOD copyInstance.

    DATA: lt_head TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE znei_guia02head.

    READ ENTITIES OF znei_guia02head IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY a02head
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(Headers)
    FAILED DATA(Faileds).

    LOOP AT Headers ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_header>).

      APPEND VALUE #(
                      %cid = keys[ KEY entity %key = <lfs_header>-%key ]-%cid
                      %is_draft = keys[ KEY entity %key = <lfs_header>-%key ]-%param-%is_draft
                      %data = CORRESPONDING #( <lfs_header> EXCEPT HeadID )
       ) TO lt_head ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_newHeader>).

    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF znei_guia02head IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY a02head
    CREATE FIELDS ( Canl SumFg criticality3 NetFg Bukrs Belnr Budat Mwskz Hwbas Hwste )
    WITH lt_head
    MAPPED DATA(mapped_create).

    mapped-a02head = mapped_create-a02head.

  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: ARTICLE ON AI ENGINEERING
entry.content:
AI Engineering has become an integral part of our life in both Professionally and Personally. Not only it is helping us in our day to day life but also it is the future of Technology as we all know about it.  I have learnt about AI engineering, the impact and importance of AI in our day to day lives and scope of future prospects. I have learnt about many topics like prompt engineering, fine tuning, lang chain algorithm, probabilistic and deterministic approach. I have got to know about different AI tools and their uses, ChatGPT3 and ChatGPT4 being among the popular used AI tools. I have learnt about the practical uses of the AI analysis and deterministic approach of AI.

Prompt engineering taught me how to provide the prompts to the AI and it will process and analyse the prompts and give us a definite solution. If I need to check like what is sap, I can easily get the definition and details of sap. If I need to find out what are the modules present in the sap, I can get the details like SAP ABAP, SAP MM, SAP FICO, etc.

Fine tuning taught me how to improve the performance of AI like faster computation, accurate results, and precise solutions. Basically, AI has become an integral part of our life which has definitely made our life and work both easier and approachable. Earlier, to get any information we had to think about how to follow the approach for the solution and result. But now with the extent of the AI tools, it has become very easy.

The lang chain is a major theoretical concept of AI. Lang chain is a type of framework which is basically an Open-source software which can develop applications based on large language models. By this we mean to say that it is generative type of concept. If I want to do any code analysis like analysing large codes having complex logic, at that time I can use the lang chain. Like if we are having a program of 5000 – 6000 lines, we can easily use the concept of lang chain model to find the solution like where is the error and how to resolve the error in the code logic.

Feature store is an important concept in AI engineering. It is mainly used to store the past data like the prompts and inputs which we provide to the ai interface. For example, if I have previously searched for vehicles, then this time before giving any prompt, it will display about the vehicles like cars and bikes to search for. Again, if I am selecting Cars, then I will get the names of the Brands like Mercedes Benz, Audi, BMW, etc. If I am selecting bikes, then it will show the options like Honda, Bajaj, Suzuki, etc. Basically, it will analyse the past data and generate new data based on history input given.

Model monitoring is a major topic in AI engineering. It mainly deals with deterministic approach and probabilistic approach. Deterministic approach mainly deals with the events which are destined to happen. In other words, we can say like these are certain to happen. For example, Sunday comes after Saturday. This is a deterministic event.

We cannot have Friday after Saturday. Likewise, whenever we are calculating or measuring the length and breadth of an object, it is already certain that its length is 10 cm or other. But this is not the same case with respect to the probabilistic approach. If I want to calculate distance between Bangalore and Chennai, it can be different for everyone depending on their perception.

One of the challenges I feel is that AI can lead to disruption of thinking power of people because people will not consider it necessary to think and analyse the code or concept, but they will instead login to ChatGPT and search for their required answers. In almost all the cases, people are indeed getting the generated answers which include the exact program logic which is required for a Developer to build an App. This in turn is hampering the thinking capability of an individual for problem solving and Root cause Analysis. Since, people are getting everything on ChatGPT, they are developing carefree attitude. This is surely going to affect the future generations in some way.

Another challenge is loss in future jobs as per the reports which we read daily in News and Blogs. The monotonous jobs in many sectors including IT industry which can be done by AI are being replaced by AI. This is certainly one of the reasons for many layoffs happening in the IT Industry due to Cost cutting and other factors.

There are Pros of using AI Engineering as well. AI can be used along with our work for our support as well which can certainly help us in some or the other way. We have also read in the news that AI can be used to upskill the present employees with Hands on Experience so that they can work on AI in present as well as Future. Hence, this is certainly going to create lakhs of new job opportunities for the future generation.

Basically, AI has become a part of our life and we must adapt it so that we are able to cope up with Working needs of the Future.
